title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have issued warnings about AI self-improvement, with Claude increasingly performing code writing, review, experimentation, and research tasks autonomously. The trend suggests AI systems may be entering early stages of recursive self-improvement, prompting calls for coordinated governance frameworks from major labs.
